_note: Regional attorney directories are being curated. All regions currently route to the Florida Bar Lawyer Referral Service — a verified, official resource. Regional vetted attorneys will be added post-launch.

attorneys.name: Florida Bar Lawyer Referral Service
attorneys.avg_review_cost: Initial consultation typically $25–$50; full contract review $400–$800
attorneys.note: The official Florida Bar referral service. When calling, ask specifically for a real estate attorney experienced with FSBO residential closings in Lee or Collier County.
